- 支持一次选择多个外部字幕字体，导入字体时不用再一个个添加
- 补全删除确认信息，会展示文件数量、大小、时长和不可恢复删除提示
- 优化大媒体库里的删除和刷新体验，删除视频后列表能更快同步状态
- 改进指定路径扫描，新增或移动视频后能更快出现在媒体库里

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Support selecting multiple external subtitle fonts at once, so fonts no longer need to be added one by one
- Complete the delete confirmation details with file count, size, duration, and an irreversible deletion warning
- Improve delete and refresh behavior in large media libraries, so the list syncs video state faster after deletion
- Improve specific path scanning, so newly added or moved videos appear in the media library faster

</details>
